name: detect_service_type
description: Detect which service the customer needs based on their initial request

service_type.description: The main service type the customer is asking about

sub_type.description: Optional sub-type if detected (e.g., umzug_privat, umzug_firma, endreinigung, etc.)

confidence.description: Confidence score (0-100) in the service type detection

keywords_detected.description: Keywords that led to this detection
